---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new analyzer, model, or API change
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to add?**
A clear description — new analyzer, model spec, stat method, or API change.

**Paper / prior work** (if applicable)
Title, arXiv link, and a one-line summary of the method.

**Which capability does it require?**
GENERATE / LOGITS / LOGPROBS / ATTENTION / HIDDEN_STATES / GRADIENTS / Trajectory

**Are you willing to contribute a PR?**
Yes / No / Maybe
